name: HAROLD TULL
title: DEAD SILENT

abilities.name: Hand Signals
abilities.text: Enemy (+) actions that target allies within 2" suffer (-) to opposed duels.

abilities.name: Reconnaissance
abilities.text: When this model ends its activation, it may make a Scheme marker in base contact with a friendly Assault marker within 6".

abilities.name: Stealth
abilities.text: While more than 6" away from this model, enemy models cannot target it and ignore it when drawing LoS.

actions.name: Stealthy Takedown
actions.costs_and_restrictions: If this action receives a raise, this model gains an Insight token.

triggers.name: Fine Tune
triggers.text: Draw a card, then discard a card.

triggers.name: Draw Out Secrets
triggers.text: Make a Scheme marker in base contact with the target.

triggers.name: Foxhole
triggers.text: This model gains a Hidden token.

actions.name: Asset Acquired
actions.costs_and_restrictions: This action may target allies. Choose an ally or Assault marker within 8" of both this model and the target. Place the target into base contact with the chosen model or marker.

actions.name: Silenced Shot
actions.costs_and_restrictions: If this model has a Hidden token, this action may be declared while engaged.

actions.name: Behind Enemy Lines
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Place this model within range. Then, make an Assault marker in base contact with this model.

triggers.name: Fog of War
triggers.text: Remove all enemy markers within ()(aura)2" of this model.

actions.name: Switcheroo
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Target a non-Scheme marker. Make a Scheme marker in base contact with the target. Then, remove the target.

merge_warnings: Title mismatch: front='DEAD SILENT' back='Dead Silent'
extraction_notes: Smokestack ability name is visible but the ability text is not shown on this card front
Cost shows '-' indicating this is likely a Master card with no hiring cost
In 'Fog of War' trigger text, there appears to be '()(aura)2"' which may be a formatting issue - interpreted as (aura)2"
